---
title: "Research"
pagetitle: "Research — Hugo Trad"
description: "Cognitive roots of administrative complexity — published, working papers, and doctoral thesis."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/research">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/recherche">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/research">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="../en/research.html" class="is-active">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/recherche.html">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/research.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="research.html" class="is-active">Research</a>
      <a href="projects.html">Projects</a>
      <a href="teaching.html">Teaching</a>
      <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Research</h1>
    <p class="inner__lede">Cognitive roots of administrative complexity — why sludge appears and persists, and how to design audits that reduce it.</p>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Published</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/bpp.2025.10025">Laypeople have difficulty processing efficiency when assessing environmental policies</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta">Marie, A., <em>Trad, H.</em>, &amp; Strickland, B. · <em>Behavioural Public Policy</em>, 2025 · doi:10.1017/bpp.2025.10025</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Working papers</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">When more is less: Additive bias as a source of sludge in policy design</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em>, Winters, J., &amp; Strickland, B. · Working paper</p>
        </li>
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">Outcome bias and the persistence of sludge</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em> · Working paper</p>
        </li>
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">The moral foundations of sludge</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em> &amp; Strickland, B. · Working paper</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Doctoral thesis</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">The War on Sludge: Uncovering the Cognitive Roots of Administrative Complexity</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta">PhD, Institut Jean Nicod · École normale supérieure (PSL), 2024</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>
  </article>
</main>
```
